description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone is primarily yellow with three broad white horizontal stripes encircling its body, each showing signs of wear and dirt accumulation. The surface is textured and appears to be made of a flexible, durable plastic or rubber, with scuff marks and scratches indicating frequent outdoor use. The base is thick, slightly beveled, and heavily stained, suggesting it has been placed on various rough surfaces. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, matching the yellow color of the rest of the cone. No logos or text are visible, and the overall condition is worn but intact, suitable for continued use in urban environments.
description: A yellow traffic cone with three white horizontal stripes, a wide square base, and visible signs of wear and dirt. The surface is textured and the cone appears sturdy and well-used.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow cone with three white stripes, prominent dirt marks, and a wide, stained base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the same color pattern, with slightly different scuff marks and a clear view of the cone's curvature.
description_view_2: Another side view with less visible dirt on the stripes and a clear look at the base's thickness and texture.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded tip, the three white stripes, and the most pronounced wear on the base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Three wide, horizontal white stripes evenly spaced around the cone's body; each stripe is approximately 10 cm wide and contrasts with the yellow background.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and yellow, with no attachments or holes.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, square, and thick, made of the same yellow material as the cone, with visible stains and a slightly beveled edge for stability.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the cone.
attribute_condition: Worn, with visible dirt, scuff marks, and some fading, but structurally intact and functional.
